characters.name: Aaron Goralnik
characters.description: CharacterAaron GoralnikNameAaron Litman GoralnikGenderMaleDate of birthApril 4, 2002 (age 24)RelativesJanice Litman Goralnik(mother)Sid Goralnik(father)Unnamed half-sisterInformationEpisode"The One Where Rachel Has A Baby, Part 2"Number of episodes1 Aaron Litman Goralnikis the son ofJanice Litman Goralnikand her husbandSid Goralnik. When Ross and Rachel were having their baby, Janice was put in the same room and revealed that she remarried and was having a son.("The One Where Rachel Has A Baby, Part 1")

characters.name: Al Zebooker
characters.description: CharacterAl ZebookerGenderMaleOccupationPaper EaterActorInformationEpisodeThe One Where Estelle DiesNumber of episodes1Portrayed byE.J. Callahan Actor Al ZebookerwasEstelle Leonard's only client aside fromJoey Tribbiani. His talent is that he eats paper. Joey speculated that he probably "eats more money than he makes". He is first heard leaving a message on Joey's phone informing him that Estelle had died. In this message, he referred to himself, in a weary tone of voice, as "the guy who eats paper," implying that Joey can't remember his real name and consequently only ever refers to him as that, to Al's irritation judging from his weary tone of voice. At Estelle's funeral he ate Joey's notes.

characters.name: Alan Lewis
characters.description: Alan Lewisis a student inRoss' class, who appeared in "The One With Joey's Award", portrayed byKyle Howard. Alan Lewis tells Ross he's in love with him, likeNed Morseand tries to get his grades changed also.

characters.name: Albert
characters.description: CharacterAlbertNameAlbertGenderMaleRelativesChandler Bing(cousin)Monica Geller(cousin-in law)Unclear:Charles Bing(uncle or ex-uncle by marriage)Nora Tyler Bing(aunt or ex-aunt by marriage)Glen(cousin, or no directly related)InformationEpisode"The One With All The Jealousy" (mentioned only) Albertis a botanist andChandler's cousin. Chandler describes Albert as "my weird cousin" when he invites Ross to come with him to Albert's bachelor party because Albert has no friends. Chandler believes Albert is only getting married so he can have an excuse to see a stripper.

characters.name: Alex Garrett
characters.description: CharacterAlexis Julia GarretGenderFemaleDate of birth~ 1976OccupationLawyer, acting SuperRelativesEric Garrett(ex-husband)Unnamed motherNancy(sister)One unnamed siblingRelationshipsJoey Tribbiani(boyfriend)Eric Garrett(ex-husband)InformationFirst appearanceJoey PilotLast appearanceJoey and the WeddingNumber of episodes46Portrayed byAndrea Anders Alexis Julia "Alex" Garrett, isJoey Tribbiani's next-door neighbor, landlord and friend. She is an educated but slightly ditzy blonde lawyer who graduated from Pepperdine University and Northwestern University. Alex doesn't appear inFriends, but she does appear in the spin-off, calledJoey.

characters.name: Allesandro
characters.description: CharacterAllesandroNameAllesandroGenderMaleOccupationOwner ofAllesandro'sInformationEpisodeThe One Where They're Going To PartyPortrayed byTaylor Negron Allesandrois the owner ofAllesandro's, portrayed byTaylor Negronin "The One Where They're Going To Party". Allesandro makes a single appearance when he angrily confrontsMonica Gellerover her harsh review of his restaurant in theChelsea Reporter, which left him and his staff feeling publicly humiliated. However, Monica impresses him by demonstrating her method of cooking tomato sauce, ultimately earning his reluctant respect.

characters.name: Allesandro
characters.description: CharacterAllesandroNameAllesandroGenderMaleOccupationOwner ofAllesandro'sInformationEpisodeThe One Where They're Going To PartyPortrayed byTaylor Negron Allesandrois the owner ofAllesandro's, portrayed byTaylor Negronin "The One Where They're Going To Party". characters.name: Althea
characters.description: CharacterAltheaMarriagesUnnamed man†(husband)AliasesNanaGenderFemaleDate of birth1915Date of death1994RelativesBiological:Judy Geller(daughter)Lillian(daughter)Phylis(daughter)Ross Geller(grandson)Monica Geller(granddaughter)Ben Geller(great-grandson)Emma Geller-Greene(great-granddaughter)Adoptive:Jack Bing(great-grandson)Erica Bing(great-granddaughter)Marital:Unnamed man†(husband)Jack Geller(son-in-law)Chandler Bing(grandson-in-law)Carol Willick(ex-granddaughter-in-law)Emily Waltham(ex-granddaughter-in-law)Rachel Greene(ex-granddaughter-in-law)InformationEpisodeThe One Where Nana Dies TwiceNumber of episodes1Portrayed byAlice Drummond Althea(also known asNana) is the maternal grandmother ofRossandMonica Geller. She was mentioned several times on the show but only appeared once in "The One Where Nana Dies Twice", portrayed by Alice Drummond. Althea (1915—1994) died in "The One Where Nana Dies Twice". After the nurse announced that she had passed and that they could see the body, Ross leaned in to kiss her goodbye and she groaned. He and Monica ran out of the room to find a nurse, telling them and his parents that she "has not passed." By the time hospital staff arrived, Althea had died for real, spurring Ross to bemuse them, his parents and his sister with the line "Nowshe's passed." Althea acted towards Judy the same way Judy does to Monica. She was very critical of Judy and claimed that nothing was ever good enough. At Nana's funeral, Judy asked Monica if she knew what it's like to "grow up with someone who is critical of every single thing you say?". Despite this, she was apparently close to both of Judy's children. Althea also had a habit of stealing packets ofSweet 'N Lowsfrom restaurants (and even the Geller's house). While Ross was looking in her closet, he found shoe boxes full of them.

characters.name: Amanda (Monica And Chandler's wedding)
characters.description: CharacterAmandaNameAmandaGenderFemaleInformationEpisodeThe One With Monica And Chandler's Wedding, Part 1Number of episodes1Portrayed byClaudia StedelinSeasonsS1S2S3S4S5S6S7S8S9S10 Amandais a guest atMonica And Chandler's Wedding, portrayed byClaudia Stedelin. Rachelthinks she isChandler's father. At Monica and Chandler's wedding rehearsal dinner, Rachel is told to talk to Chandler's father, and told he is "a man in a black dress". She mistakes Amanda for Charles and jokes about her name, thinking it means "A-man-duh!". Rachel is saved from any further awkwardness by Ross' speech.

She was portrayed byLaura Stepp.

characters.name: Amanda Buffamonteezi
characters.description: CharacterAmanda BuffamonteeziGenderFemaleInformationEpisode"The One With Ross' Tan"Number of episodes1Portrayed byJennifer Coolidge Amanda BuffamonteeziwasMonicaandPhoebe's old roommate beforeChandlerlived in the building. She was portrayed byJennifer Coolidge. Amanda isPhoebeandMonica's old roommate, she appeared in "The One With Ross' Tan", when she comes to visit the two from England. Though she is a New Yorker (from Yonkers), she has attempted to pick up an English accent (but quite often fails, sounding awful in the process - for example saying "I feel like a perfect arse"). She is somewhat egocentric, but in spite of her annoying nature, when she calls Monica's apartment and, after Chandler takes the call and bemuses Amanda by revealing to her that he takes pedicures before handing the phone to Monica, she and Phoebe agree to meet up with her in the coffee shop so as not to hurt her feelings. There, Amanda inadvertently lets out that Phoebe wanted to cut Monica out of her life in 1992 (before the series started) as Monica was at the time driving Phoebe mad by being, as Phoebe later puts it, "controlling, and compulsive, and shrill". Monica is upset about this, but Phoebe explains to her how she's glad now that she changed her mind after realizing what a nice person Monica really was despite all of this. The two make up.

characters.description: CharacterAmanda BuffamonteeziGenderFemaleInformationEpisode"The One With Ross' Tan"Number of episodes1Portrayed byJennifer Coolidge Amanda BuffamonteeziwasMonicaandPhoebe's old roommate beforeChandlerlived in the building. characters.name: Amy Greene
characters.description: CharacterAmy GreeneNameAmy GreeneAliasesErin BrockovichGenderFemaleOccupationDecorator(for her dad's office)Baby StylistRelativesBiological:Leonard Greene(father)Sandra Greene(mother)Ida Greene(paternal grandmother)Unnamed maternal grandfatherMuriel(grandaunt)Rachel Greene(older sister)Jill Greene(younger sister)Emma Geller-Greene(maternal niece)Marital:Ross Geller(ex-brother-in-law)RelationshipsMyron(Ex-Fiance)Mark(Ex-Boyfriend)Barry Farber(affair)InformationFirst appearance"The One With Rachel's Other Sister"Last appearance"The One Where Rachel's Sister Babysits"Number of episodes2Portrayed byChristina ApplegateSeasonsS1S2S3S4S5S6S7S8S9S10Amy Greeneis the younger sister ofRacheland older sister ofJill Greene, and the second daughter ofLeonardandSandra Greene. She was portrayed byChristina Applegate. Amy comes to Rachel twice, both times because of boyfriend problems. She repeatedly callsEmma, Rachel andRoss' daughter, by the wrong name. She first thought Emma was a boy called Emmett. The next time she appears she keeps calling Emma "Ella". The first time she sees the baby, she declares "You know what would be great? If you guys died!", thinking she would inherit the baby and her trials and tribulations would be made into a movie (similar toBaby Boomwith Diane Keaton). She is, however, greatly offended when she learns that actuallyChandlerandMonicawould get custody of the baby Emma instead. However, she was pleased when Chandler discovered he would not have sole custody of Emma if Monica dies. She and Rachel then start fighting when Amy said that Emma was not cute. Chandler sorted them out like a father would do. Having later become engaged to the wealthy father of an old boyfriend, she is convinced by Rachel to leave Myron - her fiancé - and try to make a new life on her own, only for this attempt to fall apart when she has Emma's ears pierced while babysitting her. Rachel and Ross flip out and Rachel forces Amy to move out, Amy claiming that she has decided to become a "baby stylist", giving fashion advice for infants. Before Amy leaves, Rachel and Amy make up by gossiping about their sisterJill, who has gotten fat.

characters.name: Amy Welsh
characters.description: Amy Welshwas a girlMonicaandRachelwent to High School with. In "The One With The Cat" (S4E02), Rachel reveals that while at the prom withChip Matthews, she couldn't find him for two hours because he was having sex with Amy Welsh.

characters.name: Andrea Waltham
characters.description: CharacterAndrea WalthamGenderFemaleRelativesStephen Waltham(husband)Emily Waltham(stepdaughter)Ross Geller(ex-stepson-in-law)unnamed stepson-in-lawMr. Waltham(brother-in-law)Unnamed nephew-by-marriageRelationshipsStephen Waltham(husband)InformationFirst appearanceThe One With Ross' Wedding, Part 2Last appearanceThe One After Ross Says RachelNumber of episodes2Portrayed byJennifer SaundersSeasonsS1S2S3S4S5S6S7S8S9S10 Andrea WalthamisEmily'sstepmother. She was portrayed byJennifer Saunders. Andrea is a very shrewish woman and has a bad marriage withher husband. They are both hostile towardsJackandJudy Gellerwhen they refuse to pay for the Walthams' wine cellar and to have their house remodeled. In "The One After Ross Says Rachel" Andrea tellsRossthat she thinks he is "delicious".

characters.name: Andrew
characters.description: Andrewwas the name ofAurora's boyfriend, though she already had a husband (Rick), a boyfriend (Ethan), and was also seeingChandler. He is never seen.

characters.name: Angela Delveccio
characters.description: CharacterAngela DelveccioNameAngela DelveccioGenderFemaleRelationshipsJoey Tribbiani(ex-boyfriend)Bob(ex-boyfriend)InformationEpisode"The One With The East German Laundry Detergent"Portrayed byKim Gillingham Angela Delvecciowas a girlfriend ofJoey. Joey dated her in the period just prior to the show's timeline. In "The One With The East German Laundry Detergent", Joey meets a former girlfriend named Angela and tries to get her back. Her last name is not mentioned, she may or may not be the same Angela Delveccio. She was portrayed byKim Gillingham. Throughout the series, Angela Delveccio is mentioned three times. Chandler tells Joey that their kitchen table was fine until his "little breakfast adventure" with her.[1]A few years later Chandler asks Joey what he gave Angela for birthday presents. Joey responds that she didn't have a birthday while they were going out, to which Chandler replies "For three years?"[2]This proves that they had a long-term relationship. Joey runs into Angela atCentral Perk, where she reveals herself to be dating a man namedBob. Joey proposes that he andMonicago on a double date, intending to break up Angela and Bob and take Angela for himself[3]. Though it's not officially stated that Angela Delveccio is the same one we see onscreen in "The One With The East German Laundry Detergent", there is no evidence that it is not her. Even though Joey dates a lot of women, it seems unlikely that he would have two ex-girlfriends named Angela within the span of a few months. At the end of "The One With The East German Laundry Detergent", Joey and Angela get back together, but probably split up again soon afterward, as she is never seen in the series again.

Joey responds that she didn't have a birthday while they were going out, to which Chandler replies "For three years?"[2]This proves that they had a long-term relationship. Joey runs into Angela atCentral Perk, where she reveals herself to be dating a man namedBob. Joey proposes that he andMonicago on a double date, intending to break up Angela and Bob and take Angela for himself[3]. Though it's not officially stated that Angela Delveccio is the same one we see onscreen in "The One With The East German Laundry Detergent", there is no evidence that it is not her. Even though Joey dates a lot of women, it seems unlikely that he would have two ex-girlfriends named Angela within the span of a few months. At the end of "The One With The East German Laundry Detergent", Joey and Angela get back together, but probably split up again soon afterward, as she is never seen in the series again.

characters.description: CharacterAnita AltmanNameAnita Altman (married name)NicknamesMrs. AltmanGenderFemaleRelativesMr. Altman (husband)InformationNumber of episodes0 Anita Altmanwas the 50-year-old librarian atLincoln High School. Ross was working late in the library one afternoon and there was only the two of them and she needed some help with a word jumble, and Ross said she was very gentle and tender.Rachelwitnessed the two of them due to her being in the library because they had magazines.

characters.name: Arthur
characters.description: CharacterArthurNameArthurAliasesBullyGenderMaleOccupationreal estate brokerInformationEpisodeThe One With The BulliesPortrayed byNicky KattSeasonsS1S2S3S4S5S6S7S8S9S10 Arthuris one of the titular characters in "The One With The Bullies". He was portrayed byNicky Katt. RossandChandlerencounter Arthur and his friendCarlfor the first time after accidentally stealing their seats while in the coffee shop. Despite the muscular, powerful build of Arthur and Carl, Chandler (most likely because of their formal, smart, and well-dressed appearances in suits and ties) feels comfortable enough in their presence to make a joke regarding the incident, but Arthur and Carl seem to get the impression that he is mocking them, so Arthur takes his hat in retaliation.

characters.name: Aunt Cheryl
characters.description: CharacterAunt CherylNameAunt CherylGenderFemaleRelativesBiological:Frannie(daughter)Ross Geller(nephew)Monica Geller(niece)Ben Geller(great-nephew)Emma Geller-Greene(great-niece)Adoptive:Jack Bing(adoptive great-nephew)Erica Bing(adoptive great-niece)Marital:Stuart(son-in-law)Rachel Greene(niece-in-law)Chandler Bing(nephew-in-law)InformationEpisodeThe One With All The CheesecakesNumber of episodes1 Cherylis one of Ross and Monica's aunts. Consequently, she is the great-aunt toEmma,Ben,JackandErica. She iscousin Frannie's mother.

characters.name: Aunt Iris
characters.description: CharacterIrisNameIrisGenderFemaleRelativesUnknown, possibly relative orfriend ofJackandJudy GellerInformationEpisodeThe One With All The PokerNumber of episodes1Portrayed byBeverly Garland Aunt Iriswas an aunt ofMonicawho appeared on-screen in the episode "The One With All The Poker". She was portrayed byBeverly Garland. From her limited interaction with Monica,RachelandPhoebe, Iris appeared to be a witty and sarcastic, but not very nice or pleasant individual. Rachel and Phoebe meet her when Monica asks her for assistance in learning to play poker, since Iris had been playing poker since she was five according to Monica, and the three women needed to prepare for an upcoming game of poker with Ross,Joey, andChandler. Iris agreed to teach them how to play, but probably because she had parked her car at a meter wasn't very patient with or polite to them, not bothering to say hello to them when she walked into the apartment but instead opening up the conversation by claiming to have hit Tony Randall with her car, then revealing that she was lying in order to demonstrate bluffing to them. She was later annoyed when they lost the game of poker to Joey, Chandler and Ross despite her advice and offered to teach them again, but she once again failed to be friendly towards them.

She was later annoyed when they lost the game of poker to Joey, Chandler and Ross despite her advice and offered to teach them again, but she once again failed to be friendly towards them.

characters.name: Aunt Liddy
characters.description: Aunt Liddyis one ofRossandMonica Geller's aunts. In "The One Where No One Proposes", whenJack Gellercomes to seeEmmaafter her birth, Ross asks him whereJudyis. He says that she is picking up Aunt Liddy. This excites Monica because it means that she and Ross get "five dollars each!" Aunt Liddy, however, is not seen in the episode.

characters.name: Aunt Marilyn
characters.description: Aunt MarilynisRossandMonica's aunt and the possible mother ofCassie. Monica mentions her in "The One With Ross and Monica's Cousin", when she says that Cassie looks exactly like her.Chandlerwas intrigued by the idea and excitedly asks if "Aunt Marilyn" is coming to the wedding. She is never seen though.

characters.name: Aunt Phylis
characters.description: Aunt Phylisis the late aunt ofRossandMonica Geller, as well asJudy Geller's sister. She is mentioned in "The One Where Nana Dies Twice", when Ross (thinkingNanawas dead at the time) said Nana will be with Pop-pop and Aunt Phylis now. Monica had no recollection of her dying. After asking Ross, he said "Yeah... for like six years," Monica responded "Where was I?".
